titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Richard Aaron Collection of Ira Cohen
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 19, 2018 at 03:57

did.unittitle: Richard Aaron collection of Ira Cohen

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, artwork, photographs, production files, printed material and other papers by, to, or relating to Ira Cohen.

did.unittitle: Cohen, Ira Columns for ABC magazine
Cohe, Ira and Mel Clay-manuscripts cut up experiments
Davis, William D. (Du Pont Co. aaudio & visual exhibits

Heliczier, Pietro-I am not afraid of the dark-ms

Margoshes, Adam Introduction to cosmic metabolism & vortical accretion (ptere Ind)
Matson, Clive To the mainline heart

Rattray, David-Emerald city-"The numbers" and "The forms"
Rattray, David "Six poems for the red flag...:"
Richkin, Robert-Picture me on a loney cross
Richkin, Robert-Rain forest: poems for Clive Matson
